name: Extrusion bracket
description: Bracket for common T-slot extrusions: choose profile for slot width. Foot prints on the bed (Z up along the arm).

parameters.label: Extrusion profile
parameters.description: Sets slot spacing and nominal slot width for the pocket (e.g. 2020 ≈ 20 mm grid).

parameters.label: Arm length
parameters.description: Vertical span of the plate that faces the extrusion (along Z).

parameters.label: Body thickness
parameters.description: Thickness of the vertical plate and foot.

parameters.label: Slot clearance add-on
parameters.description: Extra width added to the slot cut so the bracket clears the extrusion web.

parameters.label: Hole diameter
parameters.description: Used when "Custom" bolt size is selected.

parameters.label: Holes on arm
parameters.description: Through-holes along the vertical arm (axis into the extrusion face).

parameters.label: Hole rows (width)
parameters.description: Parallel rows across the foot width (Y). Capped from profile width, hole size, and minimum hole-to-edge clearance.

parameters.label: End offset
parameters.description: Inset from the arm ends for the first/last hole.

parameters.label: Countersunk holes
parameters.description: Countersink on the outer face of the mounting holes (simplified cone).

parameters.label: Slotted holes
parameters.description: Slots run vertically (along Z) for height adjustment.

parameters.label: Extra slot length
parameters.description: Additional vertical slot length beyond the clearance hole.

parameters.label: Minimum hole-to-edge
parameters.description: Keeps holes inside the arm ends.
